reviews.comment:
Para mí lo peor que hay es hacer fila para comer si tienen demandan tendrían que agrandar el lugar el moza pasa por entre medio de la gente que espera para ver sus pedido un bochorno

(Translated by Google)
For me, the worst thing is waiting in line to eat. If they have demand, they would have to make the place bigger. The waitress walks through the people waiting to see their orders, an embarrassment.

reviews.comment:
Rápida y cordial atención de los playeros. Los sanitarios siempre están en perfectas condiciones de higiene y limpieza. Además vale la pena parar y degustar algo de la pastelería del restaurante

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants provided prompt and friendly service. The restrooms were always impeccably clean and hygienic. It's also worth stopping to sample some of the pastries at the restaurant.
